Session.context: Remote software developer, budget $3000, small apartment with 10sqm spare room, needs ergonomic setup for 8+ hours daily work

Step.name: Workspace Planning
Step.description: Define workspace requirements, measure space, plan layout and electrical needs

Objective.criteria: Accurate room measurements, identify power outlet locations, natural light assessment

Item.name: Room measurement guide
Item.description: Interactive tool to measure and visualize your workspace dimensions and layout options

Item.name: Lighting assessment checklist
Item.description: Guide to evaluate natural light, identify glare issues, and plan artificial lighting

Objective.criteria: Optimal monitor placement, accessibility to power, consideration of traffic flow

Item.name: L-shaped desk configuration
Item.description: Corner desk layout maximizing space efficiency, recommended for small rooms

Item.name: Standing desk converter option
Item.description: Space-saving solution that converts existing surface to sit-stand workspace

Step.name: Core Furniture Selection
Step.description: Select primary furniture pieces including desk and chair for ergonomic daily use

Objective.criteria: Height adjustable, minimum 120cm width, cable management, under $800

Item.name: Flexispot E7 Standing Desk
Item.description: Electric height adjustable desk, 120x60cm, programmable presets, excellent stability, $549

Item.name: IKEA BEKANT
Item.description: Manual crank height adjustable, 160x80cm, simple design, good value, $449

Item.name: Autonomous SmartDesk Pro
Item.description: Dual motor standing desk, 150x75cm, anti-collision, 4 memory settings, $699

Objective.criteria: Lumbar support, adjustable armrests, breathable material, 8-hour comfort, under $600

Item.name: Herman Miller Aeron (Refurbished)
Item.description: Premium ergonomic mesh chair, fully adjustable, 12-year warranty, $599 refurbished

Item.name: Secretlab Titan Evo
Item.description: Gaming-style ergonomic chair, magnetic headrest, 4D armrests, good lumbar, $449

Item.name: Branch Ergonomic Chair
Item.description: Modern design, 7 adjustment points, breathable mesh, 7-year warranty, $349

Step.name: Tech Equipment Setup
Step.description: Configure monitors, peripherals and connectivity for optimal productivity

Objective.criteria: Minimum 27-inch displays, 4K resolution preferred, eye-care features

Item.name: LG 27UK850-W 4K Monitor
Item.description: 27-inch 4K IPS, USB-C connectivity, HDR10, height adjustable stand, $449

Item.name: Dell UltraSharp U2720Q
Item.description: 27-inch 4K USB-C hub monitor, factory calibrated, daisy chain support, $529

Item.name: VIVO Dual Monitor Arm
Item.description: Heavy-duty desk mount for 2 monitors up to 32-inch, full motion, cable management, $39

Objective.criteria: Ergonomic keyboard and mouse, wireless preferred, developer-friendly

Item.name: Logitech MX Keys
Item.description: Low-profile wireless keyboard, backlit, multi-device switching, USB-C charging, $99

Item.name: Logitech MX Master 3
Item.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse, customizable buttons, fast scrolling, USB-C, $99

Item.name: Keychron K3 Mechanical
Item.description: Ultra-slim mechanical keyboard, hot-swappable, wireless, Mac/Windows compatible, $84

Objective.criteria: Stable internet for video calls, backup options, proper cable management

Item.name: TP-Link AX3000 WiFi 6 Router
Item.description: Dual-band WiFi 6, covers up to 185sqm, easy mesh, $129

Item.name: Anker USB-C Hub 7-in-1
Item.description: HDMI, USB-A, SD card, ethernet port, compact design, $45

Item.name: Cable management kit
Item.description: Under-desk cable tray, velcro ties, cable sleeves, complete organization solution, $35

Step.name: Environment Optimization
Step.description: Enhance workspace environment for comfort, focus and wellbeing

Objective.criteria: Reduce eye strain, adequate task lighting, ambient atmosphere

Item.name: BenQ ScreenBar Plus
Item.description: Monitor-mounted LED light bar, auto-dimming, asymmetric optics prevents screen glare, $129

Item.name: Philips Hue Desk Lamp
Item.description: Smart LED desk lamp, adjustable color temperature, app control, $79

Objective.criteria: Block external noise, improve video call audio quality

Item.name: Sony WH-1000XM4
Item.description: Premium ANC headphones, 30-hour battery, excellent call quality, comfortable, $278

Item.name: Acoustic foam panels set
Item.description: 12-pack sound absorbing panels, easy install, reduces echo and ambient noise, $45

Objective.criteria: Support long working hours, prevent fatigue

Item.name: Ergonomic footrest
Item.description: Adjustable angle footrest, improves posture, reduces leg fatigue, $39

Item.name: Anti-fatigue standing mat
Item.description: Cushioned mat for standing desk use, beveled edges, easy to clean, $59

Item.name: Monitor riser with storage
Item.description: Bamboo desk organizer, raises monitor to eye level, built-in storage, $35

Session.goal: Plan a dinner party for 8 guests
Session.context: Hosting colleagues for casual Friday dinner, Mediterranean cuisine preference, budget $200, some guests are vegetarian

Step.name: Menu Planning
Step.description: Design a balanced menu accommodating dietary preferences and budget

Objective.criteria: Easy to prepare ahead, vegetarian-friendly, can serve at room temperature

Item.name: Mezze platter recipe
Item.description: Hummus, baba ganoush, tzatziki with pita bread and vegetables - serves 8, prep 45min

Item.name: Caprese skewers
Item.description: Cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, basil with balsamic glaze - vegetarian, serves 8, prep 20min

Objective.criteria: One meat option, one vegetarian, can be partially prepped ahead

Item.name: Herb-crusted lamb rack
Item.description: Mediterranean spiced lamb with roasted vegetables - serves 4-5, 90min total

Item.name: Stuffed bell peppers
Item.description: Quinoa, feta, sun-dried tomato filling - vegetarian, serves 4, can prep day before

Item.name: Greek lemon potatoes
Item.description: Crispy roasted potatoes with oregano - side dish for both mains, serves 8

Objective.criteria: Light finish, can be made ahead, impressive presentation

Item.name: Baklava
Item.description: Classic layered phyllo pastry with nuts and honey - can buy from bakery, serves 12

Item.name: Orange olive oil cake
Item.description: Moist citrus cake, naturally dairy-free - bake day before, serves 10

Step.name: Shopping and Preparation
Step.description: Organize ingredient shopping and prep timeline

Objective.criteria: Organized by store section, includes quantities for 8 servings

Item.name: Produce list
Item.description: Vegetables, herbs, citrus - shop 1-2 days before for freshness

Item.name: Protein and dairy list
Item.description: Lamb rack (2), feta cheese, yogurt - order lamb from butcher 3 days ahead

Item.name: Pantry items list
Item.description: Olive oil, spices, nuts, phyllo dough - check inventory first

Objective.criteria: Minimize day-of stress, identify make-ahead items

Item.name: 3-day prep schedule
Item.description: Day-by-day breakdown of what to prepare when, including shopping trips

Item.name: Day-of cooking timeline
Item.description: Hour-by-hour schedule for party day, including oven coordination

Step.name: Table and Atmosphere
Step.description: Set up dining space and ambiance for the evening

Objective.criteria: Comfortable for 8, encourages conversation, practical for serving

Item.name: Rectangular table layout
Item.description: Host positions at ends, guests along sides - best for passed dishes

Item.name: Buffet style option
Item.description: Food on sideboard, guests serve themselves - more casual, easier hosting

Objective.criteria: Mediterranean theme, warm and inviting, appropriate lighting

Item.name: Table setting guide
Item.description: Linen napkins, simple white plates, olive branch centerpiece ideas

Item.name: Music playlist
Item.description: Mediterranean-inspired background music, 3-hour curated playlist

Item.name: Candle arrangement
Item.description: Mixed height pillar candles, warm white, safe placement tips

Session.context: Career changer with no coding background, 10 hours per week available, goal to be job-ready in 6 months

Step.name: Foundation Building
Step.description: Master core web technologies and development fundamentals

Objective.criteria: Understand document structure, semantic elements, accessibility basics

Item.name: MDN HTML Guide
Item.description: Mozilla's comprehensive HTML tutorial, free, covers all fundamentals, ~10 hours

Item.name: freeCodeCamp HTML Course
Item.description: Interactive HTML challenges with certification, completely free, ~15 hours

Objective.criteria: Layout techniques, responsive design, modern CSS features

Item.name: CSS-Tricks Flexbox Guide
Item.description: Visual guide to flexbox layout, free reference, essential for modern layouts

Item.name: Kevin Powell YouTube
Item.description: Excellent CSS tutorials, beginner to advanced, free, practical projects

Item.name: Tailwind CSS Documentation
Item.description: Utility-first CSS framework, widely used in industry, speeds up development

Objective.criteria: Variables, functions, DOM manipulation, async programming

Item.name: JavaScript.info
Item.description: Modern JavaScript tutorial, free, comprehensive, well-structured, ~40 hours

Item.name: Eloquent JavaScript
Item.description: Free online book, deeper understanding, includes exercises, intermediate

Step.name: Framework Mastery
Step.description: Learn modern JavaScript frameworks and tooling

Objective.criteria: Components, state management, hooks, real-world patterns

Item.name: Official React Tutorial
Item.description: Updated React documentation with interactive examples, free, ~20 hours

Item.name: Scrimba React Course
Item.description: Interactive coding screencasts, project-based, free tier available

Item.name: React Portfolio Project
Item.description: Build personal portfolio site - practice routing, forms, API calls

Objective.criteria: Node.js, REST APIs, database fundamentals

Item.name: Node.js Crash Course
Item.description: Traversy Media YouTube series, practical backend fundamentals, free

Item.name: MongoDB University
Item.description: Free official MongoDB courses, NoSQL database skills, certification

Step.name: Portfolio and Job Prep
Step.description: Build portfolio projects and prepare for job search

Objective.criteria: 3-5 quality projects demonstrating different skills

Item.name: Full-stack CRUD app
Item.description: Task manager or blog with user auth - demonstrates complete skills

Item.name: API integration project
Item.description: Weather app or movie database - shows third-party API skills

Item.name: Clone project
Item.description: Simplified clone of popular site - shows ability to match specifications

Objective.criteria: Technical interview readiness, communication skills

Item.name: LeetCode Easy problems
Item.description: Practice basic algorithms, start with array and string problems

Item.name: Frontend interview handbook
Item.description: Free GitHub resource covering common frontend interview topics

Item.name: Mock interview practice
Item.description: Pramp.com offers free peer mock interviews, practice explaining code
